ddt:Target.Name: BSW_Standalone
ddt:Target.Description:
BSW
SW Compatibility : SW2,SW3
HW Compatibility : B (REF : 28447 0144R)
Projects: 43ph2 - 47
M.ZENG (BSW Pilot) tél : 82 31 289 7635 ming.zeng@renaultsamsungM.com

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCDeviceIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTCHB_DTCMB

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Calibration Number in HEXA

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number(application)

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number(application)

Data.Name: USSL.USS_FSL.DistanceToObject
Data.Comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

Data.Name: USSL.USS_FSL.ObjectDetected
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: USSL.USS_RSL.DistanceToObject
Data.Comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

Data.Name: USSL.USS_RSL.ObjectDetected
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: USSL.USS_SL.ReconizedObject
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: USSL.USS_RSL.SensorStatus
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: USSL.USS_FSL.SensorStatus
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: USSR.USS_FSR.ObjectDetected
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: USSR.USS_FSR.DistanceToObject
Data.Comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

Data.Name: USSR.USS_RSR.DistanceToObject
Data.Comment: [0 .. 5m] by steps of 10 cm, 6,3m (3Fh) : No measure performed

Data.Name: Sensors_Control_Full_Mode
Data.Comment: with distance mesurement, faults are monitored, blocked sensor detection

Data.Name: Sensors_Control_Light_Mode
Data.Comment: without distance mesurement, faults are monitored, no blocked sensor detection

Data.Name: Cfg.BSW_Init_Flashing_number
Data.Comment: range:0 to 7

Data.Name: Cfg.BSW_ThresholdSpeed.ThresholdLowActivationSpeed
Data.Comment: resolution is 0.1

Data.Name: Cfg.BSW_ThresholdSpeed.ThresholdLowDeactivationSpeed
Data.Comment: resolution is 0.1

Data.Name: Cfg.BSW_ThresholdSpeed.ThresholdHighDeactivationSpeed
Data.Comment: resolution is 0.1

Data.Name: Cfg.BSW_ThresholdSpeed.ThresholdHighActivationSpeed
Data.Comment: resolution is 0.1

Data.Name: Cfg.BSW_WarningLevel2_LED_Flashing_Rate
Data.Comment: Warning LED Flashing Rate on Alert Level 2,range 0 to 15(0.5 to 7.5Hz)

Data.Name: BSW_Switch_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Day Brithness of BSW switch LED,min:0 max:100 (1TO10)

Data.Name: BSW_Switch_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Night Brithness of BSW switch LED,min:0 max:100

Data.Name: BSW_Warning_LED_day_brightness
Data.Comment: Day Brithness of BSW Warning LEDs (Right and Left),min:0 max:100

Data.Name: BSW_Warning_LED_night_brightness
Data.Comment: Night Brithness of BSW Warning LEDs (Right and Left),min:0 max:100

Data.Name: BSW_SwitchState
Data.Comment: To read the BSW_SwitchState

Data.Name: BSW_SystemStatus
Data.Comment: To read the BSW system state

Data.Name: BSW_LeftLEDCommand
Data.Comment: switches on the left warning LED

Data.Name: BSW_RightLEDCommand
Data.Comment: switches on the right warning LED

Data.Name: BSW_InitialStateCfg
Data.Comment: Configures the Inital state of BSW (On / Off / Userdefined), userdefined is the default value

Data.Name: BSW_SwitchLEDCommand
Data.Comment: switches on the BSW switch LED

Data.Name: BSW_SVA_2ndLevelWarningSound
Data.Comment: only 1 bit has value, others fixed to 0

Data.Name: VehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: Copy of the vehicle read on CAN

Data.Name: SensorsVoltage
Data.Comment: Sensors feeding tension

Data.Name: ECUvoltage
Data.Comment: Tension at the calculator's terminals

Data.Name: BSW_StateMachine.all
Data.Comment: 0:state inactive;1:state active. bits can be set to '1' at the same time in case of sub-states

Data.Name: LogZone.TimeOfReprogramming
Data.Comment: Hour, Minute of the reprogramming

Data.Name: USSL.USS_SL.ALL
Data.Comment: fixed to 0

Data.Name: Cfg.SupplierData
Data.Comment: Data reserved for supplier use, as "black box" configuration data

Data.Name: CANV_Diagmux - Bus off
Data.Comment: Bus Off corresponds to the M_BusOff counter

Data.Name: CANV_Diagmux - BSW
Data.Comment: corresponds to the BSW_L43 must be $00

Data.Name: CANV_Diagmux - ALL
Data.Comment: Bus Off corresponds to the M_BusOff counter

Data.Name: ConfigurationPN
Data.Comment: for configuration traceability

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applica

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Status
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000
